section_1.title: Section 1 — Inflow breakdown
section_1.caption: Total Inflow = Revenue + CFP Deposit (non-revenue). Revenue is split by business segment in the table below; the CFP Deposit (customer top-ups, treated as a deposit liability) is shown to the right.

section_2.title: Section 2 — Revenue Channel · grouped by destination bank account

legend.date: slip's printed date matches the audited business date (§6 r.4).
legend.uniq: slip is not a duplicate (§6 r.5).
legend.acct: destination account read off the slip image, not inferred (§6 r.6).
legend.pos: slip's amount and channel reconcile to the POS system totals (§6 r.7–8).

section_3.title: Section 3 — Cash highlight & FR aggregation
section_3.collected: Cash collected from all segments today
section_3.banked_in: Cash already banked in (proven with deposit slips)
section_3.fr_agg_caption: FR amount = the figure printed on that Fund Report line (often a single cell summing several slips). Sum of slips = the actual total of the underlying proof-of-fund slips this audit attributes to the same FR line. Each variance row is referenced from §6 by the inline FINDING badge.
